_comment: Previous-nights gallery. Drop web-sized photos in assets/img/sunset/ and add an entry here (newest first — entries with a date sort by date, undated keep their position). Community submissions arrive via the moderation queue on sunset.html and get added here by hand after review.

photos.caption: The lake goes quiet as the last light burns along the Adirondack horizon.
Golden hour along the waterfront bike path, where every ride ends in color.
Evening settles over the moorings in Burlington Harbor.
A January sunset melts across the ice at the water's edge.
Walking on water: sunset skaters on a frozen Lake Champlain.
Chasing the last light across the ice.
